si.t: GOVERNMENT DEGREE COLLEGE GHANDALWIN, DISTT BILASPUR HP
HP Directorate of Higher Education / HPU Notifications / Standard Fee Structure PDF
Official (State-level aggregate) + College Portal where available
10+2 pass from recognized board with min 45% (40% for SC/ST)
year1: INR 2479 | year2: INR 2189 | year3: INR 2189 | girls_y1: INR 1879 | girls_y2_y3: INR 1589
Based on standard HPU affiliated Govt college fee structure 2024-25 (official PDF). Girls from HP get ~50% concession on tuition. IRDP/BPL get further reduction.
State Quota: 100% for general degree colleges. For professional courses (MBBS/BDS/B.Tech/B.Pharm): 85% State Quota + 15% AIQ.

HP State Reservation Policy for Govt Colleges: SC: 25%, ST: 4%, OBC: 10%, EWS: 10%, General: ~50.5%, PwD: 5% horizontal. IRDP/BPL: special quota. Single Girl Child: 1 supernumerary seat in PG. Defence/Freedom Fighter wards: as per state notification. Exact seat-wise split not published per college for general courses.
Application process needs verification. Admission vendor/platform unknown.
Minimal - Only state-level aggregate data; no individual college source found
year1: INR 2659 | year2: INR 2369 | year3: INR 2369 | girls_y1: INR 2059 | girls_y2_y3: INR 1769
GOVERNMENT HYDRO ENGINEERING COLLEGE BANDLA, BILASPUR.
year1: INR 119000 | year2: INR 119000 | year3: INR 119000 | year4: INR 119000
Based on HPCET/JEE counseling. HPU B.Tech fee ~INR 1.19L/year. Govt engineering colleges may vary.
85% State Quota + 15% All India Quota (AIQ) via NEET/JEE/HPCET counseling
Specialized entrance-based admission via Not UG (specialized).
Partial - Fee from state-level source; individual college website exists but not deep-mined
year1: INR 25000 | year2: INR 25000 | year3: INR 25000
Self-financing course. Fee approx INR 25,000/year as per HPU/Collegedunia. Actual may vary by college.
Bachelor of Hotel Mgmt, Travel & Tourism
Approximate based on HPU/aggregator data. Actual fee as per latest college/HPU notification.
10+2 pass with Science stream with min 50% (45% SC/ST)

As per HP state reservation policy
12% in Class-I & II, 18% in Class-III & IV for employment; 10% in education
8% from erstwhile IRDP/BPL quota + 2% new EWS
Special fee concession; previously separate 15% quota now merged
Seats as per annual state notification
Based on state/national level sports achievements
